Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Vikas, can you please check if these healthcheck failures are relevant to this upgrade in versions? Given that CM is an independent component, a version bump in HAS/OSDF should not have impacted CM health.

Patch Set 1:

is aaf sms configured correctly?  Can you run this curl command and see whether it returns a valid response? 
curl -v -k https://aaf-sms.onap:10443/v1/sms/domain/osdf/secret

Patch Set 1:

oom_redeploy

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

With a redeploy the health checks seem to be okay. We have observed this occurring intermittently with aaf-sms, and we store our app config as secrets in aaf-sms which is needed to bring them up. Are other teams seeing similar issues as well ?
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2
Change has been successfully merged by Brian Freeman

Patch Set 1:
